tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: The castle was _________. It was built over five hundred years ago.
Grandma's apple pie was absolutely _________. We all asked for a second piece.
The elephant at the zoo was _________! It was the biggest animal I've ever seen.
The milk in the fridge smelled _________. I think it's gone bad.
The baby hamster was so _________ that it could sit on my hand.
Their new house is very _________. Everything inside is brand new and high-tech.
